MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
